title: Shafin yanar gizo na IATF
summary: Shafin yanar gizon jama'a na Ƙungiyar Ƙasa ta Ƙasashen Duniya.
problem: IATF yana buƙatar gidan jama'a mai ɗorewa wanda ke bayanin samfurin, ya lissafa ayyukan, kuma ya nuna masu ba da gudummawa ga matakin da ya dace na gaba.
why: Shafin shine ƙofar jama'a ta IATF. An gina shi azaman ƙaramin aikin tsaye don haka yana da sauƙin karantawa, fassara, da kiyayewa a buɗe.
scopeIn: Shafukan sauka na jama'a da ke bayanin tsarin IATF
Rukunin jama'a na ayyukan IATF da aka yarda da su, masu aiki, da kuma adana su tare da matsayi, mai kulawa, ajiya, da demo
Tushen Turanci tare da tsari a shirye don fassara
Tsayayyen turawa a kan Cloudflare Ma'aikata Tsayayyar kadara
scopeOut: Yankunan membobin masu zaman kansu, asusun, ko hanyoyin shiga
Gudanar da lambar tushe na aikin, wanda ke rayuwa a cikin kowane ɗakin ajiyar aikin kansa
Real-lokaci chat, wanda yake zaune a cikin Discord
Binciken matsala don ayyukan mutum, wanda ke rayuwa a cikin kowane aikin GitHub repository

title: IATF kai tsaye
summary: Wani samfurin IATF na farko, wanda aka adana bayan ya isa wurin tsayawa na halitta.
problem: Bincike na farko na kayan aikin da aka mayar da hankali kan samun dama a karkashin inuwar IATF.
why: Ana adana wurin ajiyar jama'a a matsayin rikodin aikin, koda kuwa an dakatar da ci gaban aiki.
scopeIn: Samfurin farko na kayan aikin da aka mayar da hankali kan samun damar da aka adana a matsayin rikodin jama'a
scopeOut: Ci gaba mai aiki ko aikin fasali
Amfani da aka ba da shawarar a cikin samarwa

title: Ƙungiyar IATF
summary: Bot ɗin al'umma na IATF, an adana shi bayan ya isa wurin tsayawa na halitta.
problem: Automation a kusa da tashoshin al'umma na IATF.
why: Ana adana wurin ajiyar jama'a a matsayin rikodin aikin, koda kuwa an dakatar da ci gaban aiki.
scopeIn: Automation na rikice-rikice a kusa da tashoshin al'umma na IATF, wanda aka ajiye a matsayin rikodin jama'a
scopeOut: Ci gaba mai aiki ko aikin fasali
Amfani da aka ba da shawarar a cikin samarwa
